name: Tadalafil therapy for pulmonary arterial hypertension.
summary: PHIRST randomized double-blind placebo-controlled 16-week dose-ranging trial in 405 pulmonary arterial hypertension patients comparing tadalafil 2.5, 10, 20, or 40 mg once daily with placebo on 6-minute walk distance, clinical worsening, WHO functional class, quality of life, and adverse events.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
